'''Kabieroun''' was a planet in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]].

During the reign of the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]], Imperial forces enslaved the planet's native species, the [[Kabieroun (species)|Kabieroun]].

{{Planet-stub}}
